proof.CastLike_to_Cast: ONNX CastLike(x,y) casts x to y's element type; replacing it with Cast(x,to=statically inferred dtype(y)) is equal for every x and y value because y's values and shape are unobserved.
proof.Identity_bypass: ONNX Identity(x)=x for every tensor value and shape.
proof.DCE: A node/initializer unreachable from every graph output cannot affect any output.
